# x-skills

> A CLI and TUI tool for managing reusable agent skills — archive once, link where needed.

## Overview

x-skills keeps durable archived copies of agent skills in `~/.x-skills/skills` and
symlinks selected skills into project or global agent directories (Codex, Claude,
Agents). It ships with a Bubble Tea TUI for interactive management and a Cobra CLI
for scripting.

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/InkyQuill/x-skills.git
cd x-skills
mkdir -p bin
go build -o bin/x-skills ./cmd/x-skills
./bin/x-skills list
go run ./cmd/x-skills tui
```

## Key Concepts

- **Archived Skill**: a durable copy in `~/.x-skills/skills` — the canonical source
- **Active Skill**: a symlink (or real directory) visible to an agent in `.agents/`, `.claude/`, or `.codex/`
- **Link**: create an active-root symlink pointing to an archived skill
- **Install**: add a remote skill to the local archive, optionally linking it
- **Doctor**: diagnostic command that finds and optionally fixes broken symlinks, unmanaged directories, and conflicts

## Repository Structure

```
bin/              built binaries (gitignored)
cmd/x-skills/     main entrypoint
internal/         application packages (cli, tui, repo, actions, symlinkcheck, ...)
docs/adr/         architecture decision records (0001-0018)
docs/backlog.md   planned work
docs/superpowers/ plans and specs
agent/skills/     bundled agent skills used by the project
src/x_skills/     historical, non-distributed Python prototype (reference only)
CONTEXT.md        project terminology glossary
```

## CLI

```
x-skills list                    show active skills
x-skills list-roots              show managed roots and destination selectors
x-skills repo                    list archived skills
x-skills search <query>          search remote skills
x-skills add <source>            archive a remote skill and optionally link it
x-skills link <name>             link archived skill into active root
x-skills unlink <name>           remove active skill symlink
x-skills migrate <name>          archive an unmanaged active skill
x-skills doctor                  audit and fix common issues
x-skills doctor --fix -y         auto-fix without prompts
x-skills tui                     open the Bubble Tea manager
```

Destinations are selected with repeatable `--at` selectors, such as
`--at project:codex`, `--at global:agents`, or a label reported by
`x-skills list-roots`.

## References

- Repository: https://github.com/InkyQuill/x-skills
- Issues: https://github.com/InkyQuill/x-skills/issues
